_device: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra (SM-S928B), Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 + Adreno 750 + Hexagon NPU
_notes: NNAPI delegate created but fell back to XNNPACK. Samsung OneUI does not expose Hexagon to NNAPI on Android 15+. GPU (Adreno OpenCL) is slower than CPU on this tiny model because OpenCL kernel-launch overhead dominates.
